User.title: User
User.description: User profile with their name, diamonds count, and profile picture.

diamonds.description: The amount of study gems/diamonds earned by the user.

photoURL.description: The custom avatar/photo URL of the user.

unlockedAvatars.description: The custom avatars unlocked/purchased by the user.

userStreak.description: The current daily claim streak index, from 1 to 30.

lastClaimedTime.description: Timestamp in milliseconds representing the exact last reward claim.

users/{userId}.description: Collection of users containing details on user's identity and progression statistics.
